title: BulkSearcherRequest
description: Schema for BulkSearcherRequest in Nuix REST API

includeFamilies.description: Whether item families should also be matched. Defaults to false.

deduplicateFamilies.description: Whether deduplicated item families should also be matched. Defaults to false.

omitExcludedItems.description: Whether excluded items should be excluded from matches. Defaults to true.

omitImmaterialFamilyItems.description: Whether immaterial family items should be excluded from family item and deduplicated family item matches. Defaults to true.

tagUniqueItems.description: Whether to record items that only matched a single query. Defaults to false.

matchingItemsAction.description: Action to take when a matching item is found. Tagging is performed when this option is "ADD_TAGS". Defaults to "ADD_TAGS".

createUnusedTags.description: Whether to create tags even if no items match them. Only has effect if matchingItemsAction == "addTags". Defaults to false.

removeEmptyTags.description: Whether to remove tags from the case if there are no longer any items that match them. Only has effect if matchingItemsAction == "removeTags". Defaults to false.

showTagColumns.description: Whether to show the tag name columns in the results table. Defaults to true.

allowDuplicateTags.description: Whether the same tag can be applied on more than one row with different queries. Defaults to true.

allowDuplicateQueries.description: Whether the same query can be applied on more than one row with different tags. Defaults to true.

countResponsiveItems.description: Whether to compile counts for responsive items.

tagResponsiveItemsEnabled.description: Whether to apply tags to responsive items. Only has an effect if countResponsiveItems is true and tagResponsiveItemsTag is non-null.

tagResponsiveItemsTag.description: What tag to apply to responsive items. Only has an effect if both countResponsiveItems and tagResponsiveItemsEnabled are true.

missingTagsAction.description: What to do when a tag is missing in a table row. Does not affect blank rows. Defaults to FILL_WITH_QUERY.

expandTags.description: Whether tags for top-level item matches and family item matches should be expanded according to the tagExpansion map. Defaults to true.

scopingQuery.description: A query that restricts the scope of all queries in the file. i.e. a common query that is joined with every individual query to limit the items that it can match. Defaults to an empty string.

searchFields.description: A list of fields to search. If null is passed in or this field is not set or empty then a list of default search fields is used (which consists of "CONTENT", "PROPERTIES", "NAME" and "PATH_NAME").

tagRequests.description: A list of tag requests to perform.
